name: Double Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour and baking soda, and set aside.
2. Cream butter using an electric mixer.
3. Add vanilla and sugars, and beat until fluffy.
4. Beat in egg.
5. At low speed, beat in cocoa, then milk.
6. Mix dry ingredients just until blended.
7. Stir in nuts and chocolate chips.
8. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto nonstick or foil-lined baking sheets.
9. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 13 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and cool slightly before removing from baking sheets.
